windbuffon: You feel lighter on your feet.
mendingmist: You feel a soft cloak of water surround you.
dwarfbuffon: You feel in tune with the soil and stone.
warcryon: You feel ready to slay an army!
cast-fail: You are missing something to cast that...
cast-fail-toosoon: You are still tired from the last spell, slow down!
runedissipatebuff: You feel a subtle change as a temporary effect dissipates.
mindexpand: You feel your mind expand to the spell:
allknown: You already know all you can learn from these.
nowallknown: You feel you have learned all you can for this level.
crumbletodust: Its knowledge absorbed, the item crumbles to dust!
nodsc: This spell has no lang describing it! Is the Attribute 'langCode' set?
makestickdsc: Casts a projectile that turns Leaves into Sticks in a 3x3x3 area where it lands.
healotherdsc: Casts a projectile that heals the target, or the nearest to its landing point, 2.5 HP over 5 seconds.
grouphealdsc: Heal yourself, and any nearby players, for 2.5 + 0.5 health per extra target, over 5 seconds.
windstoredsc: When activated while sneaking: The projectile will mark your currently selected block on landing and refund runes. Otherwise: Send all items in a 2 block radius from landing point to location, or the inventory there, if possible.
ignitespelldsc: Casts a projectile that ignites what it hits. Charcoal pits, pitkilns, or unfortunate creatures. Does no direct damage.
superheatdsc: Increases the temperature of your mainhand item to 1300C,bigger itemstacks will have their temperature increased less.
foragespelldsc: Summons a random seed, and if you're lucky, a random fruit.
magelightdsc: Summons a rune that provides a temporary light source before decaying back into a Blank Rune
desecratedsc: Casts a projectile that harvests the nearest corpse with 20 percent bonus efficiency.
goodberrydsc: Summons a magical berry that fully satiates you.
fertilizespelldsc: Tries to give 5 percent N,K,or P to the farmland you are targeting, or the farmland under the crop you are targeting. Ignores NKP cap.
rockblastdsc: Summons a projectile that creates a rock-blasting explosion 5 blocks wide on landing. Capable of Self Damage!
dwarfblessdsc: Grants you and any nearby players 20 percent mining speed and 5 percent ore drop rate for 2 minutes, 30 seconds.
warcrydsc: Grants you and nearby players 20 percent melee damage and reduces armor damage by 20 percent for 2 minutes, 30 seconds.
windfeetdsc: Grants you and any nearby players 25 percent walkspeed for 5 minutes.
watercloakdsc: Grants you and any nearby players 25 health over 5 minutes
flowerfielddsc: Grows a random vanilla flower type in a 4 block radius around you.
refinespelldsc: Refines, or exchanges, many items into many other items.
saveselfdsc: Heals 2.5 HP instantly, then 7.5 more over 10 seconds.
saveotherdsc: Casts a projectile that Heals 2.5 HP instantly, then 7.5 more over 10 seconds.
sproutcutspelldsc: Casts a projectile that coerces a berry bush nearby to release a single traitless sprout.
airboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Acceptable damage.
airsurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Decent damage.
airblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE. Good damage.
airexplosiondsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a moderate AOE. Great damage.
airdoomdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE. Excellent damage.
earthboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Acceptable damage.
earthsurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Decent damage.
earthblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE. Good damage.
earthexplosiondsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a moderate AOE. Great damage.
earthdoomdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE. Excellent damage.
fireboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Acceptable damage.
firesurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Decent damage.
fireblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE. Good damage.
fireexplosiondsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a moderate AOE. Great damage.
firedoomdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE. Excellent damage.
waterboltdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Acceptable damage.
watersurgedsc: A simple Projectile spell. Decent damage.
waterblastdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a small AOE. Good damage.
waterexplosiondsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a moderate AOE. Great damage.
waterdoomdsc: A simple Projectile spell. Has a large AOE. Excellent damage.
itemdesc-rune-blank: Can be used to make other runes when in a Rune Altar. Search 'Rune' in the handbook!
itemdesc-rune-soul: You feel a distant connection to something...
itemdesc-rune-beta: Contains a small amount of magic.
itemdesc-rune-gamma: You can feel the magic, its faint, but there.
itemdesc-rune-delta: The aura radiating from this rune is palpible
itemdesc-rune-epsilon: The rune pulses in tune to your thoughts.
itemdesc-runicpickaxe: Can only break rock, but may drop a random rune while doing so.
itemdesc-runicchisel: Polishes raw rock in world. Handy that. Still needs a hammer.
itemdesc-goodberryitem: But one berry is all you need to fight another day...
runicresearch: A scroll containing the recipe and instructions for a Runic Spell. Can be used to gain knowledge of {0} spell for tier {1}.
hbrunes-text:
Casting And Selecting Spells
Casting and selecting spells are done with the keybind. By default, ALT + F will bring up your spell menu, and X will cast the spell, or try to.

Making Runes:
Runes are made by placing blank runes into a Rune Altar, throwing the necissary ingredients nearby, and Sneak + Rclicking with a stick.
If you don't have enough blank runes in the altar, the craft will fail. You may need multiple items per rune.

Elemental Types:
There are four types of elemental spell. When dealing damage, keep the following in mind:
Fire spells will ignite their immediate target, and deal some more damage.
Earth spells deal the most raw damage.
Water spells slightly heal the caster on hit.
Air spells deal much more knockback.
